sources.notes: SMHI meteorological observations API. Parameters: 1 (temperature instantaneous), 4 (wind speed), 3 (wind direction), 6 (humidity), 7 (precipitation 1h), 9 (pressure), 5 (precipitation 24h), 8 (snow depth), 21 (wind gust), 13 (weather code), 16 (cloud cover), and more. Versions: latest, 1.0. Periods: latest-hour, latest-day, latest-months, corrected-archive. Query station catalog at /parameter/{id}.json.

SMHI hydrological observations API. Parameters: 1 (water flow daily), 2 (water flow 15min), 3 (water level), 4 (water temperature), 5/6/7 (ice), 8 (snow density), 9 (water content), 10 (water flow monthly). Station catalog at /parameter/{id}.json. Periods: latest-day, latest-months, corrected-archive. Returns value array with date (epoch ms), value, and quality (O/G/Y). Hundreds of stations across Sweden.

SMHI oceanographic observations API. Parameters include sea temperature, salinity, sea level, wave height, currents. Station catalog at /parameter/{id}.json with geoBox covering Swedish waters (Baltic, Kattegat, Skagerrak). Data available as JSON/XML/Atom and CSV for download.

SMHI impact-based weather warnings (IBWW) test endpoint. Demonstrates the warning format with sample data. Covers: WIND, WIND_SEA, FIRE (grass fire), HIGH_FLOW, FLOODING, HIGH_SEALEVEL, WATER_SHORTAGE. Warning levels: MESSAGE, YELLOW, ORANGE, RED. Returns GeoJSON polygons with severity, descriptions (sv/en), affected areas, time ranges. Production API at /ibww/api/ gives 503 (possibly temp outage).

USGS FDSN Event query for Sweden bounding box. Returns GeoJSON FeatureCollection. Supports orderby (time/magnitude), eventtype filter, magnitude range. Also consider Swedish National Seismic Network (SNSN) at Uppsala University.

Svenska kraftnät open data portal (CKAN-based). REST API with datastore_search and datastore_search_sql. No API key needed. Resource ID from dataset catalog. Covers electricity market data: reserve capacity (FCRD, FCRN, aFRR, mFRR), production, consumption, transmission capacity, load forecasts. Also supports SQL queries and JSON filters. Max limit: 32,000 rows.

Swedish national air quality data via OGC SOS 2.0. Hosted by SMHI as data host for Naturvårdsverket. Provides near real-time and historical data for PM10, PM2.5, NO2, O3, SO2, CO, benzene, PAH, metals from Swedish monitoring stations. Also accessible via SOS REST interface and WMS.
